title: salix × paludum
intro: Salix × paludum, also known as Salix × smithiana, is a hybrid willow species that is a cross between Salix alba and Salix fragilis. The bark and leaves of Salix × paludum have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of arthritis, and soothing skin irritations. Salix × paludum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or salve, and has been used in herbal remedies to promote wound healing and reduce pain.
